name: M9 刺刀（★） | 噩梦之夜
nameZh: M9 刺刀（★） | 噩梦之夜
descriptionEn: This is the M-9 bayonet. Originally intended to be mounted on a rifle, it is also well suited to close-quarters combat. It has individual parts spray-painted solid colors in a night ops color scheme. It's the whisper of the wind... it's the bite at your neck
descriptionZh: 这是 M-9 刺刀。起初是装在步枪上面的，其同时还非常适合近距离作战。 这把武器的部分零件以黑夜行动的配色方案进行了整体喷漆。 疑是清风，却是封喉…
